title: rubus forrestianus
intro: Rubus forrestianus, also known as the Forrest raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a shrub native to the Himalayas and parts of China, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and anti-cancer properties. Rubus forrestianus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat digestive issues, fever, and various skin conditions.
